channel.title: Automation on Abdulkadir Güngör
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Abdulkadir Güngör

item.title: Continuous CI/CD Pipeline Architecture with GitHub Actions
item.description: In the modern software development world, deployment processes are as critical as writing the code itself. In an ecosystem where users can access your application 24/7, traditional methods like “maintenance mode” or “server downtime” are no longer acceptable. Zero Downtime Deployment allows you to roll out new features confidently while keeping your infrastructure running continuously.
